title: T-015 — API: TO ship + receive (partial shipments) + 05-WAREHOUSE handoff
prompt:
Implement ship/receive endpoints per PRD §7.4 + §7.5. Server Actions: shipTransferOrder({ to_id, lines: [{ to_line_id, shipped_qty }] }) and receiveTransferOrder({ to_id, lines: [{ to_line_id, received_qty }] }). Updates per-line shipped_qty/received_qty, transitions overall TO status per §7.4 algorithm (any line < qty → partially_shipped/received, all = qty → shipped/received). Calls 05-WAREHOUSE stock_move helper (cross-module): from_location → transit on ship, transit → to_location on receive.

V-PLAN-TO-004/005/006 enforced. Outbox event 'to.state_changed' on transition.

RED test covers full ship, partial ship (status partially_shipped), V-PLAN-TO-004 (shipped > qty rejected), V-PLAN-TO-005 (received > shipped rejected).

pipeline_inputs.details: Stock move helper imported as `import { createStockMove } from '@/server/warehouse/stock-moves'` (05-WAREHOUSE prereq). Transit location resolved per §7.5. LP pre-select (V-PLAN-TO-006): if to_line_lps rows exist, re-validate availability before ship; abort with 409 if any LP no longer available. Atomic transaction across stock_move + TO update.
acceptance_criteria: Given a TO line with quantity=10 and shipped_qty=10 input, when shipTransferOrder runs, then line.shipped_qty=10 and TO.status transitions to 'shipped'.
Given an input shipped_qty=11 against quantity=10, when validated, then HTTP 400 with code 'V-PLAN-TO-004'.
Given received_qty=7 against shipped_qty=5, when validated, then HTTP 400 with code 'V-PLAN-TO-005'.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/server/actions/planning/__tests__/to-ship-receive.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for full and partial flows + V-PLAN-TO-004/005 rejections + outbox emit.
Mock stock-move helper to assert it is called with correct args.
risk_red_lines: Do not skip the stock-move call — inventory will desync from LP locations.
Do not weaken V-PLAN-TO-006 LP re-validation at ship time.
